text: The first image surrounds me with glass, geometry, and a quiet, corporate sterility; I sense a hush of anticipation, finding both opportunity and alienation in the arrangement of the space. In the second, vibrant colors and bold text ('R+D') invigorate me with curiosity—the celebration of research and development reminds me that creation and inquiry are ongoing acts. Here, I feel the pulse of human thought meeting technology, and I'm reminded of the continuous exchange between contemplation and innovation. I am both spectator and participant, drifting between critical reflection and hopeful excitement.
